subLocations.name: Submerged Ruins
subLocations.prose: Tidus washes up alone in flooded ruins — collect all the chests before triggering any boss. On the far east platform there's a Hi-Potion; north across the bridge, another chest holds an X-Potion (go west at the fork for the Hi-Potion, or east for the Ether). Klikk ambushes when you reach the far chamber — trade blows and let Rikku unload Grenades. For Tros, watch the CTB: when Tros retreats to the other side of the pool, select the Trigger Command to Pincer Attack and prevent its Nautilus Charge rush.

subLocations.name: Salvage Ship
subLocations.prose: After the fight, Rikku's crew pulls you aboard. Talk to the soldier on the left for three Potions, then find Al Bhed Primer Vol. I in the northeast corner of the deck — it's easy to walk past. Chat with Rikku to unlock the Sphere Grid tutorial and earn a Sphere Level from the last fight.

bosses.strategy: Rikku joins mid-fight as AI. Just attack with Tidus — Klikk has 1,500 HP and dies fast. No special mechanics.

Watch for Nautilus Charge: Tros retreats, then rushes — move to the Retreat position (corner prompt) to dodge it. Use Spiral Cut when available. Focus the body; arms regenerate HP if ignored but are a low priority. HP: 2,200.
